title: Darmon Points — p-adic Rank 2 Construction

analysis.object: T865: Darmon Points — p-adic Rank 2 Construction depth analysis

stark_heegner.description: Stark-Heegner points (Darmon 2001): conjectural rational points for rank 2

darmon_construction.description: Darmon: integrate p-adic modular form over geodesic in upper half-plane

darmon_depth.description: Darmon points: p-adic integrals of EML-3 modular forms -> EML-3 objects

rationality_conjecture.description: Stark-Heegner conjecture: Darmon points are rational. Unproved.

berkovich_approach.description: Darmon points live in p-adic upper half-plane = Berkovich P^1 minus residue discs

berkovich_descent_darmon.description: Berkovich descent (T775) applied to Darmon's construction: p-adic point -> algebraic point?
berkovich_descent_darmon.reason: Berkovich descent to algebraic = T775 pattern

t865_theorem.description: T865: Darmon points are EML-3 p-adic constructions living in Berkovich space. Berkovich descent (T775) might prove rationality. Target: apply T775 to Darmon's construction. T865.
t865_theorem.reason: Darmon points = EML-3. T775 attack on rationality. T865.

analysis.theorem: T865: Darmon Points — p-adic Rank 2 Construction (S1145).

key_theorem: T865: Darmon Points — p-adic Rank 2 Construction (S1145).
